title: Progression Bonus
description: Reward advancement into attacking areas through successful progression
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use scoring incentives to invite forward progression
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional consequence constraint layered onto a representative base game.

title: Wide Utilization Bonus
description: Reward effective use of wide areas during play
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use scoring incentives to invite use of width
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional consequence constraint when you want width to matter more without forcing wide play.

title: Switch of Play Bonus
description: Reward switching play across the field
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use scoring incentives to invite switching
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional consequence constraint to increase the value of switching, not to require a sequence.

title: Interception Reward
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use defensive rewards to invite interceptions
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional defensive consequence constraint that sharpens anticipation and regain opportunities.

title: Turnover Reward
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use defensive rewards to invite regain
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional defensive consequence constraint that increases the value of pressure and regain moments.

title: Delay Reward
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use defensive rewards to invite delay
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional defensive consequence constraint when slowing progression is a desired defensive outcome.

title: Central Density Condition
description: Increase defensive pressure in central areas
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use spatial conditions to invite decisions
logicUsageNote: Use as a structural/spatial constraint to shape pressure in central areas and indirectly invite width.

title: Wide Zone Advantage
description: Provide scoring or positional advantage in wide areas
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use spatial conditions to invite width
logicUsageNote: Use as a hybrid spatial + consequence constraint when wide areas should become more available and more valuable.

title: Final Third Value
description: Increase scoring value in final third
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use scoring incentives to invite entry
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional consequence constraint that increases the value of penetrating into the final third.

title: Transition Bonus
description: Reward quick attacking actions after regain
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use time-based incentives to invite fast decisions
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional temporal consequence constraint that increases urgency immediately after regains.

title: Recovery Window
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use time conditions to invite recovery
logicUsageNote: Use as an optional temporal consequence constraint that increases the value of fast defensive reorganization.

title: Transition Trigger
suggestedConstraintPrompt: Use transition triggers to connect phases
logicUsageNote: Use as a structural transition condition that connects phases; pair with other constraints if more consequence is needed.
